description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage define a test job that uses the invisal/hello Docker image, attaches a mysql:latest service, sets MYSQL_DATABASE and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables, and runs the commands: composer install, cp .env.testing .env, php artisan key:generate, php artisan config:cache, php artisan migrate, and php vendor/bin/phpunit. In the deploy stage define a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, targets the deploy environment, and executes: eval $(ssh-agent -s), ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY"), mkdir -p ~/.ssh, create an SSH config disabling StrictHostKeyChecking when inside Docker, and ssh root@$SSH_SERVER "bash /var/www/deploy.sh $DB_BACKUP_USER $DB_BACKUP_PASS". Both jobs are limited to runners with the khmercoders tag.
